pages.title: ADR-001: Adopt Recursive Language Model Pattern
pages.description: Decision to adopt the RLM pattern for long-context processing.

pages.title: ADR-002: Use Rust as Implementation Language
pages.description: Decision to use Rust for the rlm-rs implementation.

pages.title: ADR-003: SQLite for State Persistence
pages.description: Decision to use SQLite for persistent state storage.

pages.title: ADR-004: Multiple Chunking Strategies
pages.description: Decision to support multiple chunking strategies.

pages.title: ADR-005: CLI-First Interface Design
pages.description: Decision to prioritize CLI as the primary interface.

pages.title: ADR-006: Pass-by-Reference Architecture
pages.description: Decision to use pass-by-reference for data flow.

pages.title: ADR-007: Embedded Embedding Model
pages.description: Decision to embed the embedding model rather than use external APIs.

pages.title: ADR-008: Hybrid Search with RRF
pages.description: Decision to combine BM25 and vector search via Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

pages.title: ADR-009: Reduced Default Chunk Size
pages.description: Decision to reduce default chunk size for better granularity.

pages.title: ADR-010: Switch to BGE-M3 Model
pages.description: Decision to switch embedding model to BGE-M3.

pages.title: ADR-011: Error Handling with thiserror
pages.description: Decision to use thiserror for error type definitions.

pages.title: ADR-012: Concurrency Model with Rayon
pages.description: Decision to use Rayon for data-parallel concurrency.

pages.title: ADR-013: Feature Flag Architecture
pages.description: Decision on feature flag architecture for optional functionality.
